summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Export Excel R1/R2 feature for Actualizacion module. All 15 tests passed. Verified: (1) R1 has 27 columns with PRIMER_APELLIDO, SEGUNDO_APELLIDO, PRIMER_NOMBRE, SEGUNDO_NOMBRE; (2) Names are parsed correctly from nombre_propietario using parsear_nombre_propietario(); (3) R2 has 41 columns with 3 constructions per row; (4) Row colors applied correctly for visitado_firmado status; (5) Excel has 3 sheets: REGISTRO_R1, REGISTRO_R2, RESUMEN.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Export Excel R1/R2 for Actualizacion module tested and working. Use project ID 32ba040f-ed50-45e2-a115-22ab3a351423 (Proyecto_prueba_ZU_Sardinata). The export has 8731 predios with 11573 propietarios in R1. Row coloring verified for visitado_firmado status (D1FAE5 green fill).

name_parsing.3_word_names: PASS - PEREZ PENARANDA LEONARDO -> primer_apellido=PEREZ, segundo_apellido=PENARANDA, primer_nombre=LEONARDO
name_parsing.5_word_names: PASS - HEREDIA GUTIERREZ JUAN DE DIOS -> segundo_nombre=DE DIOS

row_coloring.original_no_color: PASS - Rows with ORIGINAL tipo_cambio and pendiente estado_visita have no color
